# TopCryptoCards

> Independent comparison platform for cryptocurrency cards in Europe. Compare 90+ crypto cards: cashback rates, annual fees, staking requirements, and availability by country.

## About

TopCryptoCards is a free, independent comparison tool for crypto debit and credit cards available in Europe. The site covers France, Belgium, Germany, Austria, Spain, Italy, and the United Kingdom.

The site is not affiliated with any card issuer. Affiliate links are disclosed on the affiliate disclosure page.

## Content

- Card comparisons: cashback, annual fees, staking requirements, card networks, virtual/physical availability
- Brand reviews: Crypto.com, Nexo, Bybit, Revolut, Bitpanda, MetaMask Card, Gnosis Pay, Brighty, Bleap, and more
- Country-specific card availability (MiCA-regulated markets)
- Thematic guides: best cashback cards, no-fee cards, travel cards, no-staking cards, beginner cards
- Blog articles on crypto card features, European regulations (MiCA), and market updates
- Interactive comparison tool and savings simulator

## Languages

Available in: French (fr), Belgian French (be), German (de), Austrian German (at), Spanish (es), Italian (it), English / UK (en).

## Contact

- Website: https://topcryptocards.eu
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/cryptocards_eu
